title: Pozitification
description: Adds crawling, sitting, lying down and other poses
body:
# Pozitification ![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-0.2-1E90FF?style=for-the-badge) ![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-26.1+-4C9A2A?style=for-the-badge) ![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-DBD0B4?style=for-the-badge) ![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-25-ED8B00?style=for-the-badge&logo=openjdk&logoColor=white) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/pozitification?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&color=00AF5C&label=downloads)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pozitification) ![Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/side-client%20%26%20server-9B4DCA?style=for-the-badge) [![Telegram](https://img.shields.io/badge/Telegram-channel-26A5E4?style=for-the-badge&logo=telegram&logoColor=white)](https://t.me/pro100chnl)
--- ## 📌 What is this? **Pozitification** is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 26.1 that adds synchronized player poses — sit, crawl, and more. Just press a key and your character actually sits down. Or crawls. Other players with the mod can see it too. No more faking it with crouching or boats. --- ## ✨ Features - **Sit down** — press a key, sit anywhere - **Crawl** — press a key, move low - **Stand back up** — anytime, instantly - **Multiplayer sync** — other players with the mod see your poses - **Customizable keybinds** — through vanilla Controls menu - **Client + server** — works best when installed on both sides --- ## 🎮 Default Controls | Action | Key | |:------:|:---:| | Sit | **X** | | Crawl | **Z** | | Stand up | **Left Shift** | All keys can be changed in the standard **Controls** menu. --- ## 🎯 What's in version 0.1? This first release is intentionally focused on the essentials: - stable sitting - stable crawling - proper standing up - pose sync in multiplayer - clean, lightweight code The goal is a solid foundation before adding more advanced movement systems. --- ## 🌍 Multiplayer Pozitification is designed for multiplayer. - Poses are **synchronized** between players - Others with the mod see when you sit or crawl - Works best when installed on **both client and server** --- ## 💡 Why Pozitification? Minecraft movement feels limited — especially for: - roleplay - immersion - screenshots & machinima - casual social play This mod adds player expression without turning Minecraft into a complicated animation system. It's meant to feel **lightweight, practical, and easy to use**. --- ## 🛣️ Planned Improvements Version 0.1 is just the beginning. Future updates may include: - smoother pose transitions - better animation polish - improved multiplayer edge-case handling - more pose states - better visual alignment with ground - wider mod compatibility - configurable behavior --- ## 🔧 Technical Direction Pozitification focuses on: - Fabric 26.1 support - clean gameplay integration - multiplayer sync - lightweight implementation - practical use in normal gameplay --- ## 📥 Installation 1. Install **Fabric Loader** for Minecraft 26.1 2. Put **Fabric API** and **Pozitification** in your `mods/` folder 3. Launch the game For multiplayer, install the mod on **both client and server**. --- ## ⚙️ Requirements - **Minecraft 26.1** - **Fabric Loader** - **Fabric API** - **Java 21** --- ## 📦 Dependencies **Required:** - Fabric API **Optional:** - None --- ## ❓ FAQ
Does it work on servers? Yes, but other players need the mod to see your poses. Without the mod, you'll just look like you're crouching.
Can I change the keybinds? Yes — all keybinds are customizable in the standard Controls menu.
Does it work with other mods? Generally yes. If you find incompatibilities, report them.
Why are there no animations yet? Version 0.1 focuses on core mechanics. Animation polish is planned for future updates.
Forge version? Not planned at the moment. Fabric only for 26.1.
